title: DaYunErrorEnvelope
description: Error envelope returned by POST /calculate/bazi/dayun when a required direction basis is missing under strict=true (HTTP 422). Mirrors `spec/schemas/ErrorEnvelope.schema.json` (the canonical FuFirE error envelope, Draft-07) and tightens `error` and `detail.precision` for the dayun endpoint. The shape is inlined rather than composed via `allOf` + cross-draft `$ref` to keep our 2020-12 validator chain simple. Keep this file in sync with `spec/schemas/ErrorEnvelope.schema.json`. TODO: replace `$id` host before production release.

error.description: Machine-readable snake_case error code. Pinned to the only error currently emitted by this endpoint; extend to an enum if more arise.

message.description: Human-readable error summary (German UI copy lives in `detail` or upstream).

detail.description: Structured diagnostic data. For this endpoint, carries the `precision` block so downstream UI can render the missing-state panel without re-deriving it.

precision.description: Mirrors `precision` from dayun.response.schema.json so clients can recover the same shape regardless of success or failure.

status.description: HTTP status code mirrored in the body for clients that cannot inspect headers.

path.description: Request path that produced this error.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp of the error.

request_id.description: UUID v4 correlating this response to the X-Request-ID header.

examples.message: Richtungsgrundlage fehlt: weder explizite Vorgabe noch Geschlechtsangabe verfügbar.
